title: Login page redirect failing
description: Initial symptom: When the integration test for the login page runs, after filling in credentials and clicking submit, the expected redirect to /dashboard does not happen. The test times out because the page remains on /login. This causes the CI pipeline to fail.

title: Add user registration API
description: Implement REST endpoint for new user sign-up with email verification.

title: Set up staging environment
description: Provision a staging server mirroring production for pre-release testing.
